question: Our goal is to deploy battery prognostics directly onto local edge devices for real-time monitoring. I need to know if AssetsOpsBench can generate lightweight Remaining Useful Life (RUL) models. Take our 10Hz raw time-series testbed data and train a predictive model targeting a 30% capacity fade criteria. Run an inference test on a subset of these cells and give me the MAE and the inference execution time. Plot the predicted RUL trajectory against the actual recorded degradation. I need to prove to my team that we can get high-accuracy RUL numbers locally without massive computational overhead.
